blockers.title: Show exact current release blockers in YAPPC cockpit
blockers.description: YAPPC cockpit must display exact current release blockers from evidence ingestion

blockers.title: Validate evidence freshness during ingestion in YAPPC
blockers.description: Evidence freshness must be validated during ingestion to prevent stale data

blockers.title: Persist release cockpit records through Data Cloud in YAPPC
blockers.description: Release cockpit records must be persisted through Data Cloud for durability

blockers.title: Strengthen asset promotion validation in YAPPC
blockers.description: Asset promotion validation must be strengthened to prevent invalid promotions

blockers.title: Add doc-truth cockpit to YAPPC
blockers.description: Doc-truth cockpit must be added to YAPPC for documentation governance

blockers.title: Add guided reuse cockpit to YAPPC
blockers.description: Guided reuse cockpit must be added to YAPPC for asset reuse guidance

blockers.title: Add product creation flow to YAPPC
blockers.description: Product creation flow must be added to YAPPC for new product onboarding

releaseBlockersView.description: View to display exact current release blockers with severity and status

evidenceFreshnessIndicator.description: Indicator showing evidence freshness and staleness warnings

blockerResolutionTracking.description: Tracking for blocker resolution progress and ownership
